title: ace up my sleeve
description: Lyrics from ace up my sleeve
body:
))}}

written on august 16th, 2021 at 07:15 pm

))}}

ayo smooty, why would he do me like that
who'd he think he was to me to justify that
caught a beauty cuz he didn't truly think i would bust him right back
shooting before he knew me and the nuts that i have
i'm talking screwy, drive a nail through me
i'm already into it, seeing what's in my bag
what's in my way
what's on my mind
what's my next play
everyday i'm shuffling
what can i say
to get you to see
that i cannot give you whatever you need
